overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the protagonist Link running through a foggy, snow-dusted mountain pass. The environment features rocky cliffs, scattered snow-covered pine trees, and low visibility atmospheric conditions typical of a high-altitude winter setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain meadow with scattered snow pines

events.description: a small round stone hut becomes visible through the fog on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Link is running steadily forward through the foggy terrain toward a large snow-covered pine tree in the distance

entered.detail: large dark rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the mountain pass
tall snow-covered evergreen tree standing prominently in the fog ahead
large boulder and rock outcropping on the right side of the meadow
small round stone structure with a domed roof visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Link running through a wide, foggy mountain meadow. A large snow-covered pine tree stands ahead in the mist, while a rocky cliff defines the left boundary. Around 8 seconds, a small stone hut becomes visible on the left. The terrain is grassy with sparse vegetation and low visibility due to heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass between rocky cliffs

events.description: the terrain transitions from open meadow to a narrow mountain pass as rocky cliffs close in on both sides
passing the large snow-covered pine tree, which moves to the right side and begins to exit the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing to run through the narrowing mountain pass, moving between rocky cliff walls with a tall dead tree visible ahead

entered.detail: tall thin dead tree trunk standing upright in the middle of the path ahead
rocky cliff face forming the right boundary of the narrow pass

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrower mountain pass with rocky cliffs closing in on both sides. Link passes the large snow pine tree on the right as a tall dead tree becomes visible ahead. The path becomes more enclosed and the terrain shifts to a dirt trail between the rock walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain slope with wildlife and abandoned camp

events.description: a fallen camp structure becomes visible on the left, and wolf-like creatures appear through the fog on the right side

agents.ego_description: running through the opening terrain toward a fallen structure, while wolves are visible resting on the right side of the path

notable_agents.action: two wolf-like creatures are resting on the grassy slope to the right, partially obscured by fog

entered.detail: collapsed tent or debris structure with fabric and poles scattered on the ground
cluster of large rocks and boulders on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens up again into a wider mountain slope. Link approaches a fallen camp structure on the left while two wolves rest on the right side, partially visible through the fog. The rocky cliffs recede into the distance as the terrain becomes more open and grassy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy mountain landscape that shifts from an open meadow into a narrow pass before expanding once more onto a wide slope. It begins with Link running through a misty, grassy meadow bordered by a rocky cliff, passing a small stone hut as a large snow-covered pine tree looms ahead in the fog. As the camera moves forward, the environment tightens into a narrow dirt trail enclosed by rocky cliffs on both sides, leading Link past the pine tree and toward a tall, dead tree. The scene then opens up again as the cliffs recede, transitioning back into an open grassy terrain. Finally, the path reveals a fallen camp structure on the left and two resting wolves on the right, partially obscured by the lingering mountain mist.
